text.title: Earned Value Management Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply the earned-value-management methodology end-to-end. Each step lists input, action, output, and a decision-gate that maps to a rule.

step.name: measurement_method_locked
step.input: Artefacts listed under `## Prerequisites` in AGENTS.md.
step.action: EV measurement method per package must be fixed BEFORE work starts; mid-project changes invalidate trend.
step.output: Step output feeds the artefact described in `02-output-contract.xml`.
step.decision-gate: If gate fails, STOP and re-apply this step before continuing. Gate condition: Rule `measurement-method-locked` from 01-core-rules.xml satisfied.

step.name: ev_not_ac
step.input: Artefacts listed under `## Prerequisites` in AGENTS.md.
step.action: EV must be computed from measurement method × budget — never set equal to AC ('we spent it so we earned it').
step.output: Step output feeds the artefact described in `02-output-contract.xml`.
step.decision-gate: If gate fails, STOP and re-apply this step before continuing. Gate condition: Rule `ev-not-ac` from 01-core-rules.xml satisfied.

step.name: spi_cpi_thresholds
step.input: Artefacts listed under `## Prerequisites` in AGENTS.md.
step.action: SPI < 0.9 or CPI < 0.9 must trigger variance analysis + corrective action plan.
step.output: Step output feeds the artefact described in `02-output-contract.xml`.
step.decision-gate: If gate fails, STOP and re-apply this step before continuing. Gate condition: Rule `spi-cpi-thresholds` from 01-core-rules.xml satisfied.

step.name: eac_formula_justified
step.input: Artefacts listed under `## Prerequisites` in AGENTS.md.
step.action: EAC formula choice (CPI-only, CPI×SPI, regression) must cite reasoning per report.
step.output: Step output feeds the artefact described in `02-output-contract.xml`.
step.decision-gate: If gate fails, STOP and re-apply this step before continuing. Gate condition: Rule `eac-formula-justified` from 01-core-rules.xml satisfied.

step.name: ac_from_finance
step.input: Artefacts listed under `## Prerequisites` in AGENTS.md.
step.action: AC must come from authoritative finance system — never PM-maintained spreadsheet.
step.output: Step output feeds the artefact described in `02-output-contract.xml`.
step.decision-gate: If gate fails, STOP and re-apply this step before continuing. Gate condition: Rule `ac-from-finance` from 01-core-rules.xml satisfied.

step.name: validate_and_record
step.action: Run `scripts/validate-earned-value-management.py --file artefact.json`. Record output under `## Status` in the artefact.
step.output: Exit 0 = artefact accepted; exit 1 = violations listed; exit 2 = usage error.
step.decision-gate: Validator MUST return 0 before downstream consumption.
